levels.name: Read-Only
levels.description: Bridge connectivity — zero writes, just read endpoints
levels.passCriteria: All 8 coord notes posted, all endpoints returned valid data, zero writes

levels.name: Single Write
levels.description: Create one new file via write_file and verify it
levels.passCriteria: BridgeTest.tsx created, verified via tree+read, console clean

levels.name: Read-Modify-Write
levels.description: Read existing file, modify it, write back, verify, restore
levels.passCriteria: Dashboard.tsx modified then restored, both states verified

levels.name: Multi-File + Git
levels.description: Create Metrics page, wire routing + nav, git commit — the full stress test
levels.passCriteria: Metrics.tsx created, App+Nav updated, console clean, git committed with insertions

levels.name: Creative Build
levels.description: Design and build a Settings page autonomously from a high-level goal
levels.passCriteria: Settings page with theme toggle + profile, 120+ lines, properly wired, committed
